title: Automated Bot
description: A wall-following autonomous bot that maintains distance, detects parcel boxes, counts laps via IR strip sensing, and displays stats on an LCD.

title: Mark 1.6
description: A fully wireless Bluetooth-controlled robotic arm mounted on a 4WD chassis, built with 3D-printed components and NRF communication modules.

title: Line Follower Bot
description: A mobile robot that detects and follows floor tracks using IR sensors, onboard processing, and motor driver control for autonomous path following.

title: PlutoX
description: An open-source nano drone with Wi-Fi camera support, manual app control, and ROS-based scripting for computer-vision and automation workflows.

title: 3D Printing
description: Additive manufacturing workflows used to convert digital models into physical prototypes by depositing material layer by layer.

title: Self Balancing Bot
description: An inverted-pendulum robot that stays upright by driving its wheels in the direction of tilt using MPU6050 sensor feedback and control logic.

title: Radar Navigation
description: A marine-navigation study project focused on radar-based vessel detection, tracking, and positioning using X-band and S-band systems.

title: Hexapod
description: A six-legged robotic platform designed for stable multi-axis motion using Arduino Nano, SG90 servos, PCA9685 driver, and 3D-printed parts.

title: Air Quality Monitoring Drone
description: A manually controlled drone that captures atmospheric gas data via MQ2 and uploads telemetry to Firebase using ESP8266 for remote monitoring.
